description_long: This is a large, two-story detached house surrounded by a low perimeter wall and featuring a spacious front yard with a driveway and parked car. The house has a symmetrical facade with a central entryway, a covered porch supported by columns, and multiple evenly spaced windows. The rear of the property includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a rectangular swimming pool, as well as landscaped green spaces. The roof is a prominent, multi-hipped design with gentle slopes, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The property also features a side driveway leading to a covered parking area and a mix of paved and grassy surfaces. The overall design is modern with subtle classical influences, emphasizing comfort and outdoor living.
description: A large, two-story modern house with a hipped roof, central entry porch, front driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entry porch with columns, driveway, and parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hipped roof, side driveway, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio with outdoor seating, swimming pool, and landscaped backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, covered parking area, and a portion of the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, columns, and double doors
